cassette: none: cypher.S3ExternalPrincipalGrantWriter operates over flat map[string]any rows, not a CanonicalMaterialization; the two fixture rows live inline in go/internal/replay/costcounting/s3_external_principal_grant_cost_test.go
description: Two distinct-uid GRANTS_ACCESS_TO rows in one scope, driven through the production writer over an InstrumentedExecutor. S3ExternalPrincipalGrantWriter has one Cypher template (single-entry relationship_type vocabulary) and no per-row batching split, and the default batch size (500) comfortably covers two rows, so the writer emits exactly one UNWIND write statement (eshu_dp_neo4j_batches_executed_total=1, statements_executed=1). Any increase — an N+1 write cycle or an extra batch split — trips the gate.
refresh_path: manual: edit the inline fixture rows in s3_external_principal_grant_cost_test.go and this file together, reviewed in the same diff (no credentialed cassette refresh applies since there is no cassette)
